channel.title: Comments for page "Present Tense"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Present Tense"

item.title: Author Post
item.content:encoded:
"I never think of the future — it comes soon enough."
–Albert Einstein

This tale was written for my friend Modulum for the winter spirit. I decided to cheer him up by continuing this tale series. I'm aware the tale could be longer, go into detail more, or otherwise be improved by shifting the focus, but I wanted this piece to be special to Modulum specifically. I just hope everyone else enjoys it too.

Thank you to everyone who critiqued this article! I appreciate how quickly everyone replied, and the overwhelming amount of critique I received.

That's about all there is to it. Thank you for reading, and have a nice day!
